name: Women's Dress – Baby Pink Oval Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="t22-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="t22-oval-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_LIGHT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="t22-bottom" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <clipPath id="t22-img-clip"><rect x="160" y="80" width="760" height="820"/></clipPath>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#t22-bg)"/>
  <g fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_LIGHT" fill-opacity="0.08">
    <circle cx="80"  cy="80"  r="12"/><circle cx="240" cy="80"  r="12"/><circle cx="400" cy="80"  r="12"/>
    <circle cx="560" cy="80"  r="12"/><circle cx="720" cy="80"  r="12"/><circle cx="880" cy="80"  r="12"/>
    <circle cx="1040" cy="80" r="12"/><circle cx="160" cy="200" r="12"/><circle cx="320" cy="200" r="12"/>
    <circle cx="480" cy="200" r="12"/><circle cx="640" cy="200" r="12"/><circle cx="800" cy="200" r="12"/>
    <circle cx="960" cy="200" r="12"/>
  </g>
  <text x="540" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="8">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <rect x="160" y="80" width="760" height="820" rx="380" fill="url(#t22-oval-bg)"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#t22-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="160" y="80" width="760" height="820" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="148" y="68"  width="784" height="844" rx="392" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2"   opacity="0.3"/>
  <rect x="136" y="56"  width="808" height="868" rx="404" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.15"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="78" rx="28" ry="10" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="540" y="996"  text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="22" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK" fill-opacity="0.6" font-style="italic" letter-spacing="6">PLACEHOLDER_COLL_WORD</text>
  <text x="540" y="1064" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="78" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_MAIN</text>
  <text x="540" y="1106" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="8">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_SUB</text>
  <line x1="160" y1="1126" x2="920" y2="1126" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.3"/>
  <text x="540" y="1154" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE</text>
  <rect x="0" y="1176" width="1080" height="174" fill="url(#t22-bottom)"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1176" x2="1080" y2="1176" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="60"  y="1244" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"   font-size="13" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="60"  y="1316" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"     font-size="80" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  <rect x="688" y="1198" width="336" height="72" rx="36" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
  <text x="856" y="1242" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="856" y="1268" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL</text>
  <text x="540" y="1340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>
</svg>

PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE.label: Features line
PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE.default: Sizes XS–XL  ·  Chiffon  ·  Hand wash  ·  Gift wrap available
